description: TradingView script intake manifest — tracks all imported candidates

scripts.title: RVWAP Mean Reversion Strategy
scripts.author: vvedding
scripts.description: Rolling VWAP mean reversion using stdev bands. Long when price dips below lower band and crosses above; short when price crosses below upper band. Exits at RVWAP cross. Multiple anchor options (30m-Y).
scripts.notes: Open source. v1.56 (Feb 2026). Adjustable anchors. Core mean reversion logic. High automation fitness.

scripts.title: HYE Mean Reversion VWAP Strategy
scripts.author: HYE0619
scripts.description: RSI-filtered Jaws Mean Reversion using VWAP instead of SMA. Long when 2-period VWAP closes 3%+ below 5-period VWAP and RSI(5) EMA < 30. Short on inverse. Multi-period VWAP cross logic.
scripts.notes: Open source. Based on PJ Sutherland Jaws algorithm. Clear deterministic rules. Good automation candidate.

scripts.title: Dynamic Swing Anchored VWAP STRAT
scripts.author: PineIndicators
scripts.description: Pivot-to-pivot Anchored VWAP strategy. Recalculates AVWAP at each confirmed swing pivot using EWMA decay on price*volume. Enters long on bullish structure flip, closes on bearish flip.
scripts.notes: Open source. Pine v6. Zeiierman collaboration. Unique EWMA-decay AVWAP approach. Long-only (strategy.close, not short). Adapts to volatility.

scripts.title: VWAP Mean Reversion v2
scripts.author: natha_horton
scripts.description: VWAP mean reversion strategy v2. Uses VWAP with standard deviation bands for entries on extreme deviations and targets mean reversion back to VWAP.
scripts.notes: Open source. Iterated v2 suggests refinement. Core mean reversion concept.

scripts.title: BabyShark VWAP Strategy
scripts.author: GreatestUsername
scripts.description: VWAP strategy combining VWAP deviation bands (stdev or avg deviation) with OBV RSI confirmation. Uses VWAP as central reference with deviation bands for entries.
scripts.notes: Open source. Unique OBV RSI combination with VWAP. Dual deviation mode (stdev/avg). Good volume confluence.

scripts.title: VWAP-RSI Scalper FINAL v1
scripts.author: michaelriggs
scripts.description: Intraday scalping strategy for prop firm challenges. Combines VWAP directional filter, RSI(3) oversold/overbought triggers, EMA trend filter, and ATR-based risk management. Session-controlled (US cash). Designed for 3m-15m futures charts.
scripts.notes: Open source. Explicitly designed for prop firm challenges + funded accounts. Built for ES/futures. Very high automation fitness. Session hours filter.

scripts.title: VWAP Bands Backtest
scripts.author: signalsr
scripts.description: Backtest strategy for VWAP offset bands. Evaluates profitability of trading VWAP upper/lower band touches as entries. Based on Noro code for band logic.
scripts.notes: Open source. Simple band-touch strategy. Good baseline for VWAP band mean reversion. Partially based on Noro code.

scripts.title: VWAP Retest + EMA9 Cross + Candle Pattern V2
scripts.author: lindittl
scripts.description: Intraday momentum strategy combining VWAP retest (price within buffer zone), EMA9 crossover above VWAP (within 3 bars), and bullish candle patterns (hammer/engulfing/momentum). US morning session only (9:30-12:30 EST). TP +3%, SL 0.5% below VWAP, forced exit at 1PM.
scripts.notes: Open source. 120 trades backtested Jan 2023-Oct 2025: 52.5% WR, 1.18 PF, 1.22% max DD. Very specific rules. Good prop fit with session control and defined exits.

scripts.title: GCK VWAP BOT
scripts.author: GCKPROFITTRADING
scripts.description: Comprehensive VWAP bot with confidence scoring (0-975 scale), multi-target exits (60%/120%/200% of TP), ATR volatility-adjusted stops, smart position sizing. Supports 3 external indicators + Anchor VWAP. Painted trend visualization.
scripts.notes: Open source. Very feature-rich. Confidence scoring includes HTF analysis, market structure, session quality, volatility filter, volume profile. Smart multi-target exits. High automation fitness.

scripts.title: EMA and VWAP CROSS
scripts.author: James_Buchanan
scripts.description: Cut-and-reverse strategy based on EMA/VWAP crossover. Enters long when EMA crosses above VWAP, reverses to short when EMA crosses below. Simple trend-following VWAP cross logic.
scripts.notes: Open source. Very simple crossover logic. Good baseline strategy. May need filters for chop. Cut-and-reverse means always in market.

scripts.title: VWAP+15EMA with RSI
scripts.author: Soeccke
scripts.description: Strategy entering long when close is above both VWAP and 15 EMA, with RSI confirmation above overbought level. Combines three-indicator confluence for entry filtering.
scripts.notes: Open source. Simple three-indicator confluence. Momentum-based (buys strength). May need exit refinement.

scripts.title: RSI of VWAP
scripts.author: mohanee
scripts.description: Uses VWAP as RSI source instead of close price. Entry when RSI(VWAP) crosses above 70 and price above 200 EMA. Partial exit at RSI 90 level. Full exit at RSI cross down 30. Stop loss 5%. Position sizing via risk calc.
scripts.notes: Open source. Unique concept: RSI calculated on VWAP, not close. Has companion SHORT version. Partial profit taking at RSI 90. Clear defined rules.

scripts.title: VWAP and RSI Strategy
scripts.author: eemani123
scripts.description: Long strategy: EMA50 > EMA200 trend filter, close above VWAP session value, RSI(3) dipped below 10 in last 10 candles (pullback detector). Exit on RSI(3) cross down 90. SL 5%. Optional RSI divergence add-on.
scripts.notes: Open source. Tested on SPY/QQQ hourly. Clear rules. RSI divergence parameter for position adding. Good pullback detection logic.

scripts.title: VWAP and BB Strategy [EEMANI]
scripts.author: eemani123
scripts.description: Combines VWAP with Bollinger Bands. Long when EMA50>EMA200, close above VWAP, and price dipped to BB lower band in last 10 candles. Exit on close above BB upper band. SL 5%. Optional BB %B mode.
scripts.notes: Open source. Same author as VWAP+RSI strategy (eemani123). BB lower band as entry trigger with VWAP confirmation. Updated to use 13/55 EMAs. Good mean reversion + trend combo.

scripts.title: VWAP Breakout NY Open Only
scripts.author: Fullportdav
scripts.description: VWAP breakout strategy targeting multiday moves. Takes only 2 trades per day in first 2 hours of NY session. Session-limited breakout from VWAP level at market open.
scripts.notes: Open source. Dec 2025. Session-restricted (first 2 hours NY). Max 2 trades/day. Good prop fit with trade limiting. Breakout style rather than mean reversion.

scripts.title: VWAP Breakout Strategy (Momentum, Vol, VWAP, RSI, TrSL)
scripts.author: JS_TechTrading
scripts.description: VWAP breakout algorithm using real-time price action signals (not candle open/close). Combines MA, VWAP, and RSI qualifier for trend reversal detection. Includes stop-loss, take-profit, and trailing stop-loss exits.
scripts.notes: Open source. Pro version with full risk management suite (SL/TP/TSL). Uses real-time price action rather than close-based signals. JS_TechTrading has multiple VWAP strategies.

scripts.title: JS-TechTrading: VWAP Momentum_Pullback Strategy
scripts.author: JS_TechTrading
scripts.description: VWAP pullback strategy for stage-2 uptrends using Minervini Trend-Template qualifier. RSI spots oversold conditions, MA/VWAP crossover signals end of selling pressure. Dynamic SL/TP. Applicable 5m to daily.
scripts.notes: Open source. Minervini Trend-Template as qualifier is unique. 32 backtests documented on TradeSearcher. Good for swing + intraday. Same author as VWAP Breakout.

scripts.title: ES Scalping Pro: EMA + VWAP + ATR
scripts.author: ramtrading
scripts.description: ES futures scalper using EMA 9/21 crossover with VWAP directional filter. Long when fast EMA crosses above slow EMA and price above VWAP. Short on inverse. Fixed tick stops (40) and targets (80). Built specifically for ES.
scripts.notes: Open source. Explicitly designed for ES futures contracts. Fixed tick-based risk management (40 SL, 80 TP). Very high futures compatibility. Simple deterministic rules.

scripts.title: VWAP Stdev Bands Strategy (Long Only)
scripts.author: qamberabbas4
scripts.description: Long-only strategy using VWAP standard deviation bands for entries in trending markets. Includes profit target, customizable time gap between orders to prevent overtrading, and previous day VWAP reference. Adjustable stdev values.
scripts.notes: Open source. Long-only limitation. Time gap between orders is useful anti-overtrading feature. Previous day VWAP plotting. Good for trending markets.

scripts.title: EMA + VWAP Strategy
scripts.author: cryptocu84
scripts.description: Trend-following intraday strategy: EMA 9/21 + VWAP. Long when EMA9 crosses above VWAP with EMA9 > EMA21 and VWAP has directional slope. Smart VWAP flat filter skips choppy conditions. ATR-based stops (1.5x ATR14), 2:1 R:R targets. 5-15min charts.
scripts.notes: Open source. VWAP flat filter is a standout feature - detects chop and skips. ATR-adaptive risk. Weekday filter. Very well-documented. Good automation fitness.

scripts.title: RSI-VWAP Indicator Strategy
scripts.author: UnknownUnicorn2151907
scripts.description: Uses VWAP as RSI source. Percentage-of-equity entries and percentage-of-position closings. Laddered entries to improve average entrance price. Spot mode option. RSI(VWAP) cross-based signals.
scripts.notes: Open source. Laddered/pyramided entries unique feature. Uses VWAP as RSI source (similar to mohanee but different implementation). Good for swing trading.

scripts.title: VWAP Breakout Strategy + EMAs + Clean Cycle/TP/SL Plots
scripts.author: CatalystNQ
scripts.description: VWAP breakout with EMA confirmation, Full Cycle Zone detection (pivot lows + swing range visualization), round-number psychological levels, ATR-based stops/targets. Designed for intraday charts (5m-H1).
scripts.notes: Open source. Unique cycle zone detection feature. Round-number level confluence. ATR-adaptive. Good visualization. Designed for NQ-style intraday trading.

scripts.title: VWAP Strategy (Neptuko)
scripts.author: Neptuko
scripts.description: Intraday futures strategy around NYSE open VWAP. Long/short when price reclaims NY VWAP, pulls back to hold it, with 5/8/13 EMA trend confirmation. Designed for futures intraday trading.
scripts.notes: Open source. NYSE VWAP reclaim + pullback hold is a well-known institutional setup. 5/8/13 EMA stack for trend confirmation. Good futures fit.

scripts.title: ICT Master Suite [Trading IQ]
scripts.author: Trading-IQ
scripts.description: Comprehensive open-source strategy combining multiple ICT models (2022 Model, Unicorn Model) with backtesting. OB, BB, RB, FVG, Equal Levels.
scripts.notes: Multiple ICT models, deep backtesting, open source. AF=4.

scripts.title: Liquidity Sweeper
scripts.author: Mejunda
scripts.description: Strategy identifying liquidity sweeps at swing highs/lows (stop hunts), enters reversal trades. ATR-based SL, configurable R:R TP.
scripts.notes: Clean sweep reversal logic, ATR stops, 2:1 R:R default. AF=5.

scripts.title: Liquidity Sweep Filter Strategy [AlgoAlpha X PineIndicators]
scripts.author: PineIndicators/AlgoAlpha
scripts.description: Non-repainting strategy combining liquidity sweep detection with trend shift confirmation and volume-based liquidation analysis.
scripts.notes: Non-repainting, trend shift + sweep combo, volume profile. AF=5.

scripts.title: SMC Strategy
scripts.author: danieltbolsch
scripts.description: Smart Money Concepts strategy using discount/premium zones with 50-period SMA trend filter.
scripts.notes: Discount/premium zones, SMA trend filter. AF=4.

scripts.title: Smart Money Concept Strategy - Uncle Sam
scripts.author: UncleSamTrading
scripts.description: SMC strategy combining swing-based trendline breakouts with volume confirmation and optional MA trend filter.
scripts.notes: Trendline breakouts + volume, MA filter. AF=4.

scripts.title: ICT Indicator with Paper Trading
scripts.author: Blessed-Inspired
scripts.description: Order block breakout strategy. Enters long when price crosses above order block high.
scripts.notes: OB breakout, no SL/TP built-in. AF=3.

scripts.title: PineScript-SMC-Strategy
scripts.author: tsunafire
scripts.description: GitHub-hosted SMC strategy identifying order blocks and liquidity sweeps with dynamic SL/TP based on recent swing highs/lows.
scripts.notes: GitHub, clean code, OB + sweep + dynamic SL/TP, easy to fork. AF=5.

scripts.title: Liquidity Sweep Reversal Strategy
scripts.author: mitchell-917
scripts.description: GitHub Pine v6 strategy detecting sweep reversals with volume filter.
scripts.notes: GitHub, Pine v6, sweep reversal + volume filter. AF=4.

scripts.title: Order Block Volumatic FVG Strategy
scripts.author: TagsTrading
scripts.description: Converts BigBeluga FVG visualization into entry/exit strategy. Measures mitigation depth into FVG boxes. Trailing stop.
scripts.notes: Pine v6, mitigation-based FVG entries, trailing stop, volume analysis. AF=5.

scripts.title: Captain Backtest Model [TFO]
scripts.author: tradeforopp
scripts.description: Session range breakout strategy initially tested on ES/NQ 5m. Waits for session range sweep to determine bias, enters on pullback retracement.
scripts.notes: Open-source, futures-proven ES/NQ 5m, deterministic rules. AF=5.

scripts.title: Smart Money Concept + Strategy Backtesting Toolkit [Shah]
scripts.author: AlphaWings
scripts.description: Comprehensive SMC backtesting toolkit with CHoCH-based entries in golden Fibonacci zone, DCA support, advanced exit management.
scripts.notes: CHoCH + Fib golden zone, DCA, multi-target TP, break-even. AF=4.

scripts.title: Gold Fair Value Gap Entry (FVG GOLD)
scripts.author: hasnocool
scripts.description: GitHub FVG strategy for gold. Enters long on positive gap vs fair value, short on negative. Fixed SL/TP.
scripts.notes: GitHub, simple FVG, gold-focused. AF=3.

scripts.title: FVG Strategy - Fair Value Gap
scripts.author: Karoshi-Trading
scripts.description: FVG strategy with Fibonacci retracement entry refinement. Enters when price reaches Fib level within FVG and rebounds.
scripts.notes: FVG + Fib retracement, formation countdown, structure lookback. AF=4.

scripts.title: Long-Only Opening Range Breakout (ORB) with Pivot Points
scripts.author: VolumeVigilante
scripts.description: Long-only ORB with pivot-point-based trailing stops and EOD exit. Max trades/day limiter.
scripts.notes: Pivot trailing stops, EOD close, max trades limiter. AF=5.

scripts.title: Open Drive
scripts.author: Marcn5_
scripts.description: Market-profile-inspired strategy identifying open drives from cash market open times. 5-bar breakout threshold, 3-bar hold exit.
scripts.notes: Market profile open drive, 3-bar hold, futures-designed. AF=4.

scripts.title: Gold ORB Strategy (15-min Range, 5-min Entry)
scripts.author: krypson
scripts.description: ORB for Gold/XAU-USD. NY session 9:30-9:45 AM opening range. 3 SL methods. Adjustable R:R.
scripts.notes: Gold-specific, 3 SL methods, session-specific. AF=5.

scripts.title: IU Opening Range Breakout Strategy
scripts.author: Shivam_Mandrai
scripts.description: ORB with configurable R:R, max 2 trades/day, EOD close at 3:15 PM.
scripts.notes: Max trades, EOD close, R:R config. AF=5.

scripts.title: Strategy: Range Breakout
scripts.author: pradipandsuvra
scripts.description: Simple session range breakout. Basic but clean implementation.
scripts.notes: Simple template, basic structure. AF=3.

scripts.title: High-Low Breakout Strategy with ATR Trailing Stop Loss
scripts.author: Wealth-Guru
scripts.description: First-30-min breakout with ATR trailing stop, 50% partial profit at 3%, break-even, EOD exit at 3:15 PM.
scripts.notes: ATR trailing, partial profit, break-even, EOD exit. Most complete risk management. AF=5.

scripts.title: NY Opening Range Breakout - MA Stop
scripts.author: shui2967
scripts.description: NY session ORB (9:30-9:45) with dual exit modes: fixed R:R or MA-crossback stop.
scripts.notes: Dual exit modes (R:R or MA crossback), NY session. AF=5.

scripts.title: NY ORB Breakout Strategy (MambaFX x DoyleStyle)
scripts.author: menardpro97
scripts.description: Pine v6 NY session ORB with EMA trend filters (200/50/13), optional retest confirmation, session window enforcement.
scripts.notes: Pine v6, multi-EMA trend filter, retest confirmation, futures-designed. AF=5.

scripts.title: ORB Breakout Strategy with VWAP and Volume Filters
scripts.author: luiscaballero
scripts.description: Classic ORB with three toggleable filters (VWAP+slope, volume, candle strength). Breakeven adjustment, EOD exit.
scripts.notes: Best filter architecture: VWAP+slope, volume, candle strength. AF=5.

scripts.title: 15-Minute ORB Breakout Strategy with VWAP and Volume Filters
scripts.author: luiscaballero
scripts.description: NASDAQ futures-focused 15-min ORB with VWAP slope, volume, candle strength. BE at 50% TP.
scripts.notes: NQ-focused, 15-min OR, same author as ORB-009 refined version. AF=5.

scripts.title: ORB Algo | Flux Charts
scripts.author: fluxchart
scripts.description: Full ORB algo with backtesting dashboard, multiple TP methods (Dynamic EMA or ATR-based).
scripts.notes: Multiple TP methods, backtesting dashboard, fully customizable. AF=5.

scripts.title: Reversal & Breakout Strategy with ORB
scripts.author: Stock_Reaver
scripts.description: Multi-mode: ORB breakouts + EMA crossover breakouts + RSI/SMA reversals. 2-stage exits.
scripts.notes: Multi-mode, VWAP+SMA200 filter, 2-stage exits, pyramiding. AF=4.

scripts.title: ORB Strategy + Backtesting (fixed timestamp)
scripts.author: juanmr888
scripts.description: Complete ORB with 3-level TP, monthly performance tracking, timezone-aware session config.
scripts.notes: 3x TP levels, monthly dashboard, session+timezone selector. AF=5.

scripts.title: 15 min orb (15min ORB Retest Strategy)
scripts.author: CashPort
scripts.description: 15-min ORB with retest entry, configurable entry levels, fixed-point SL/TP, $2.50/contract commission.
scripts.notes: Retest entry logic, fixed-point SL/TP, commission modeled. AF=5.

scripts.title: Script_Algo - ORB Strategy with Filters
scripts.author: Script_Algo
scripts.description: ORB + SuperTrend indicator + volume filter for false breakout rejection.
scripts.notes: SuperTrend confirmation, volume filter. Needs adaptation for futures. AF=4.

scripts.title: ORB Breakout Strategy with reversal
scripts.author: Ciuchers
scripts.description: ORB with reversal logic, max SL in points, R:R targeting, American session filter.
scripts.notes: Reversal option, max SL in points, American session. AF=3.

scripts.title: 15-Min Opening Range Breakout
scripts.author: Hardest_Easy_Money
scripts.description: Set-and-forget 15-min ORB. Buy stop above OR high, sell stop below OR low, 20-point fixed target.
scripts.notes: Set-and-forget, buy/sell stop orders, 20pt target. Index futures. AF=5.

scripts.title: Gap Momentum System (TASC 2024.01)
scripts.author: PineCodersTASC
scripts.description: Perry Kaufman's Gap Momentum from TASC magazine. Cumulative gap series with SMA signal line for long-only entries.
scripts.notes: Academic source (TASC), cumulative gap momentum, long-only. AF=5.
